column1: Yordan Alvarez leads the slate with a strong combination of reliability and upside, carrying a high hit probability and a favorable platoon advantage against Chris Bassitt. Ernie Clement also offers steady production from the top of Toronto’s lineup, facing a hittable starter in Brayan Bello. Nico Hoerner and Juan Soto provide additional options, but Alvarez’s recent form and matchup make him the most dependable choice for Beat The Streak players tonight.
